titleStmt.title: SII 10.355: original edition by J. Ramayya Pantulu
No. 355. (A.R. No. 203 of 1905.) ON THE TOP OF THE DOORWAY OF THE WEST WALL OF THE KITCHEN IN THE TEMPLE OF TRIPURĀNTAKĒŚVARA, TRIPURANTAKAM, MARKAPUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT. Ś. 1179. (Piṅgaḷa)

summary.p: States that Chāḷukya Nārāyaṇa Bhīmarāja Siddayadēva gave the village of Keduṟēpalli on the Musi in Pūṅgināṇḍu to god Tripurāntaka-Mahādēva. Gives a string of the donor's birudas. The donor seems to be a small local chief.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
surēśvaratrivikramacakravittikula
hasranavalakṣagrāmavēṁgīpuravarādhīśvara
viṣṇuvarddhana Amarārāmapaṁca
dākṣārāmabhīmēśvaradēvapādapaprakṣāḷana
kiṁkkara birudarājabhayaṁkara Arirāyasa
llakīpallavagajēṁdra maṁtha sā
dhakadraviḷabhayajvara karnnāṭamaṁḍaḷikavairi
gōdhūmaghaṭṭanagharaṭṭa ballāḍarāyadiśāpaṭṭa
Ēkāṁggavīra vīrāvatāra Asahāyaśūra
yarasānunavacōḍamallanārāyaṇa vidvi
ṣṭahṛdayaśalya Aribalatimira
nātha mīsaṟagaṁḍa Aivaragaṁḍa kadanapraca
ṁḍa satyahariścaṁdra śaucagāṁgēya paranārī
dūra pratāpalaṁkēśvara parabalanāśakara nā
mādi samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāma
ṁḍalēśvara cāḷukyanārāyaṇa bhīmarā
ju siddhayadēvamahārājulu svasti śakava
rṣaṁbulu 1178 Agu nēṁṭi piṁgaḷasaṁva
tsara Āṣāḍha śuddha 5 budhavāramunāṁ
ṭi karkkāṭakasaṁkramāṇanimittamuna
śrītripurāṁtaka śrīmahādēvara Aṁgara
ṁgabhōgālaku pūṁgināṁṭilōni muśika
ṟiti keduṟepalli catussīmamunu dhā
rāpūrvvakamu śēsi Icce . svadattāṁ parada
ttāṁ vā yō harēta vasuṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭi va
ruṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē kri
miḥ .
Digital edition of SII 10.355 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
